# Field A

**Summary**: The specific geographic area where the drilling data for this study was collected.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-al-abduljabbar|Al-AbdulJabbar, 2020]] analyzed drilling data from multiple wells within Field A.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2020-al-abduljabbar|Al-AbdulJabbar, 2020]] Includes carbonate and sandstone formations.

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- Data from 8 wells in Field A were used to develop a robust white-box model for vertical well profiles. ([[2020-al-abduljabbar|Al-AbdulJabbar, 2020, p. 134]])
